nasb.text: Know therefore that the Lord your God, He is God, the faithful God, who keeps His covenant and His lovingkindness to a thousandth generation with those who love Him and keep His commandments;

esv.text: Know therefore that the Lord your God is God, the faithful God who keeps covenant and steadfast love with those who love him and keep his commandments, to a thousand generations,

cnv.text: 所以你要知道耶和華你的　神，他是　神，是信實可靠的　神；他向愛他和守他誡命的人，守約並且施慈愛，直到千代。

ccb.text: 所以你们要知道，你们的上帝耶和华是真神，是信实的真神，祂向爱祂、遵守祂诫命的人守约、施慈爱直到千代。
